name: GitHub Chat MCP
what_it_does: GitHub Chat MCP server enabling AI agents to semantically search and chat with GitHub repositories — indexing codebases for semantic search, asking questions about code, finding relevant functions and patterns, and integrating conversational code exploration into agent-driven code review and understanding workflows.
use_cases: Semantically searching codebases for patterns from code review agents
Asking natural language questions about repository code from analysis agents
Finding relevant functions and implementations from code exploration agents
Understanding unfamiliar codebases from onboarding agents
Locating code related to specific features from debugging agents
Analyzing open source repositories from research agents
not_for: Making code changes (read-only exploration and search)
Private repositories requiring enterprise GitHub access controls
best_when: An agent needs to semantically understand and navigate GitHub repository code — particularly useful for exploring large open-source codebases or onboarding to new projects.
avoid_when: You need exact text search (use grep/GitHub code search), need to make changes, or need real-time code updates.

auth.notes: GitHub token for repository access. May also require embedding API key (OpenAI or similar) for semantic indexing. Check repo for current auth requirements.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GitHub API free tier; embedding costs depend on codebase size
pricing.paid_tiers: Embedding API costs for large codebases (OpenAI/embedding provider)
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Embedding API costs apply for semantic indexing. GitHub token free for public repos.

performance.rate_limits: GitHub API: 5,000 req/hour; embedding API limits depend on provider

known_agent_gotchas: Requires initial indexing step before queries work — not instant setup
Embedding costs scale with codebase size — large repos can be expensive to index
Semantic search quality depends on embedding model and indexing strategy
Community MCP from AsyncFuncAI — limited maintenance history
Re-indexing needed when codebase changes significantly
Multiple API keys may be required (GitHub + embedding provider)
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. GitHub token required — minimal scope (read-only). Embedding API key required. Community MCP. Codebase content sent to embedding provider — check privacy policy.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Multiple API keys needed. Code sent to embedding provider — check privacy. Community MCP.
